transcript: It's a pleasure to be here today to discuss some very exciting new features that Titan will be launching to really sharpen our users' trading edge. You know, Titan has only been, you know, Titan has been known to provide one of the most advanced algorithms out there, providing our users the best prices the majority of the time on Solana. But it's important to remember that Titan's only been around for only a really short period of time. We only launched public, uh, our public launch two months ago on that side. Taking a look at our year in review, right? We've provided users on our frontend app alone more than $6.5 million in trading edge. This comes from a combination of providing better prices as well as fee savings on our platform. We've done over $8 billion in volume with over 100,000 unique traders and we've done a hundred plus integrations and API partner integrations in 2025 alone, and we look forward to continuing this trend in 2026 as we build along these core fundamentals that we've established right now. Now, one of the main things that we see that is really needed in internet capital markets in Solana is a need for a real limit order system. The biggest issue with limit orders today is that during periods of high volatility, like during October 10th, orders were just not filled. Or if there's a major wick, then they just, you know, don't get executed on that side. And that's because limit orders today are more similar to trigger orders that get activated periodically. Now, traders need confidence that the orders are going to be filled when that price limit hits, right? That's why today, one of the most requested features on Titan, limit orders, will be, uh, released in the very short future. We understand that traders do want to have, you know, the best fills at the correct timings, which is why we're proud to announce that our limit orders will be powered by top traders, top trading firms in the ecosystem. So Auros and Galaxy are going to be the ones powering our limit order system. And most importantly, these are real limit orders and they are also very competitive. They're up to 17% cheaper than various alternatives out there. With these top trading firms really, you know, filling your orders, they give traders the confidence that your orders will be filled on time at the correct prices on that side. This is, uh, we are also planning to roll this out with a limited token, uh, set of token pairs initially in conjunction with World Liberty Fi on that side, so incentives will be in place for the first couple weeks of the launch on here. Another big thing that we're trying to solve are this problem of airdrop scam tokens into your wallet. I think everybody has that same issue, you know, you open up your wallet, there's like, you know, 10 different JitoSOL airdrop scam tokens on there and you just need to clean them out. Users, both new and old, do have issues sometimes when they're trading, you might accidentally click a swap and it just is a full scam token that you can never reclaim. We're also announcing today Titan Forge. It's powered by Scam Incinerator on the backend side, but basically it allows you to reclaim your rent from empty token accounts as well as get that rent that these scammers are trying to, uh, basically pay, uh, to your own token account. Not only that, but these token balances are sent to a recovery vault where upon if somebody is a victim of a scam, this recovery vault tries to prevent that scam from happening and return, uh, as much funds as possible to the victim while the contributor also gets a reward to that. We think this is a huge plus to the ecosystem as a whole on that side. Another thing that we really do want to announce as well is our private swaps. Privacy is a feature that we think is very, very important as we go along in the future of Solana, and we're proud to announce that our private swaps will be powered by Vanish. Vanish already powers private swaps on Axiom along with running Titan's trading infrastructure in the backend to really execute it. Vanish is known for having like the best real-time, real-time execution on a private manner while having that compliance factor inbuilt, uh, onto it. So we really believe that this is the future that we see privacy to be enabled on. The last thing I do want to announce on that side is that everybody has been requesting our API on that side. Our Titan Prime API will be distributed by our partners Triton and QuickNode very, very soon on that front. Uh, their technological expertise as well as experience promoting applications through their platforms will really allow users to get the best prices through our websocket API implementation and also allow platforms and protocols to really get that same snappy UX feel that you get from using websockets, so you can get the best performance, uh, possible on that side. To close it off, I just want to thank all our users, our community, and Solana in general, right? Without you guys, we wouldn't be here. Um, so basically thank you and Titan mode on.

enrichment.generated_query: Titan Limit Orders Solana Breakpoint 2025 official announcement blog docs

sources.title: Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
sources.snippet:
Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f0866da8eed4c/6867a1f64ca2c75f0d14f371_16c97ce9017b907297827c5113a068f9_Frame%201597880158.avif)](https://www.drift.trade/)
[
Launch App
](#)
## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

# Coinbase Opens Trading for All Solana Tokens to 100 million Users in Major On-Chain Shift
By[Liam Turner](https://www.cryptoninjas.net/authors/liam/)
December 11, 2025
* 3min read
![coinbase-opens-trading-solana-tokens](https://www.cryptoninjas.net/wp-content/uploads/coinbase-opens-trading-solana-tokens.jpeg)
**Key Takeaways:**
* Coinbase will allow its 100M users to trade every Solana token instantlythrough a fully on-chain integration.
* No listings required– tokens become tradeable the moment they appear on Solana, using on-chain liquidity routed through Coinbase’s interface.
* The move signals a structural shiftas centralized exchanges lean toward blockchain-native markets and real-time asset discovery.
Coinbase has taken one of its largest steps yet toward on-chain markets, announcing that every Solana token will now be instantly tradeable inside its main app. The update gives millions of retail and professional users direct access to Solana’s rapidly expanding token ecosystem without relying on traditional exchange listings.
The change aligns with a broader trend across the industry: centralized platforms increasingly serve as gateways to

sources.title: Phantom Adds Limit Orders to Perps on Solana Wallet
sources.snippet:
Bullish

Introducing limit orders on Phantom Perps boosts trading efficiency and risk management for Solana perpetual futures, which can drive higher trading volumes and user engagement. Historically, the rollout of advanced order types on decentralized platforms, such as dYdX’s UI enhancements, correlated with increased liquidity and stronger market sentiment.
In the short term, traders may open more positions and execute strategies with greater precision, lifting SOL ecosystem activity. Over the long term, improved order management helps retain users and attract sophisticated traders to Phantom’s mobile wallet, reinforcing bullish sentiment around Solana-based derivatives trading.

tags.impact_reason: Titan introducing limit orders powered by top trading firms is a solid update that enhances trading infrastructure on Solana, but it is not ecosystem-shattering.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a high-precision mechanical switch as the semantic anchor because the story is about creating a 'real limit order system' that provides 'guaranteed execution' during volatility. The switch represents the limit order flawlessly triggering and locking into place, bringing order and confidence to the surrounding chaos of the market. I included the text 'EXECUTE' diegetically laser-etched into the metal receiving slot to highlight the theme of guaranteed action and the finality of the transaction.
visual_idea.description: A central, large-scale mechanical switch, crafted from polished tungsten and anodized aluminum, is depicted in the act of locking into place. This is the moment a limit order executes. The mechanism glows with a controlled, serene green light, contrasting sharply with the chaotic storm of blurred, red and orange data streams representing market volatility in the deep background. Laser-etched onto the metal receiving slot, the word 'EXECUTE' is visible, catching the light as the switch makes contact, signifying guaranteed execution.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, vertical composition (3:4 aspect ratio) emphasizing epic scale and vast negative space at the top. At the center, a large-scale mechanical switch, precisely crafted from highly polished tungsten and anodized aluminum, is depicted in the critical act of locking into place. This is the exact moment a limit order executes, rendered with the utmost precision engineering. The mechanism emanates a controlled, serene green volumetric light, which dramatically cuts through and contrasts sharply with the chaotic storm of blurred, intensely red and orange data streams representing volatile market data, swirling in the deep background. Laser-etched with exquisite detail onto the polished metallic receiving slot, the word 'EXECUTE' is prominently visible, catching the light as the switch makes firm contact, powerfully signifying guaranteed execution. The scene is bathed in cinematic volumetric lighting, creating dramatic light rays and a sense of immense power with high dynamic range. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, sharp focus, clean lines.

editorial.headline: Titan Taps Galaxy and Auros to Fix Solana Limit Orders
editorial.standfirst: The "Meta-Aggregator" moves beyond simple swaps, deploying institutional-grade liquidity to guarantee execution during volatility.
key_takeaways: Limit orders will be powered by market makers **Galaxy** and **Auros**, replacing unreliable on-chain triggers.
Launch incentives feature **World Liberty Financial (WLFI)** pairs, capitalizing on the high-profile project's liquidity.
New **Titan Forge** and **Vanish** integrations address wallet hygiene and trade privacy for sophisticated users.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a move that signals the maturation of Solana's market structure, **Titan** CEO Chris Chung announced a fundamental overhaul of how limit orders function on the network. Until now, most on-chain limit orders have effectively been "trigger orders"—automated instructions that attempt to swap when a price point is reached. As Chung noted, these frequently fail during periods of high volatility, such as the October 10th market turbulence, leaving traders with unfilled positions despite price targets being hit.

Titan's solution is a pivot toward institutional execution models. By partnering directly with top-tier market makers **Auros** and **Galaxy**, Titan is replacing the probabilistic nature of AMM-based triggers with guaranteed fills backed by professional liquidity. Chung claims this approach is not only more reliable but up to 17% cheaper than current alternatives. This development bridges a critical gap for institutional investors who require NASDAQ-level certainty when entering or exiting large positions on-chain.

The aggregator is also aggressively expanding its utility stack for sophisticated users. The introduction of **Titan Forge**, powered by **Scam Incinerator**, allows traders to reclaim rent from spam token accounts—a persistent nuisance in the Solana ecosystem. More notably, Titan is integrating **Vanish** to power private swaps. This feature offers compliance-aware privacy, ensuring that large orders can be executed without immediately alerting MEV bots or copy-traders, a necessity for preserving "alpha" in an increasingly transparent ledger environment.

Finally, Titan is cementing its status as a foundational infrastructure layer through new distribution deals. The **Titan Prime API** will now be distributed by **Triton** and **QuickNode**, two of the network's leading RPC providers. By embedding its routing logic directly into the developer infrastructure that powers the rest of the ecosystem, Titan is effectively positioning its "Meta-Aggregation" algorithm—which aggregates other aggregators—as the default execution engine for Solana applications.
